_doc: Reviewed baseline of generated↔variables.css token divergences. The app imports src/styles/tokens.generated.css (@theme, @generated) then src/styles/variables.css (:root), which re-defines these tokens to different RENDERED values. tokens:check (Gate 2) ratchets this set: any NEW divergence, or a value change on a listed entry, or a listed entry that no longer diverges, fails the gate. Entries marked UNREVIEWED are pre-existing drift pending a reconcile decision (chunk F). Scope: variables.css only (the last-winning override layer); styleseed-tokens.css is an earlier layer not yet covered.

--color-accent-glow.reason: UNREVIEWED: color/shadow override; some a11y-driven (variables.css L598); reconcile direction TBD (chunk F)

--color-info.reason: UNREVIEWED: color/shadow override; some a11y-driven (variables.css L598); reconcile direction TBD (chunk F)

--font-body.reason: Font stack quote-style / fallback-list variant (cosmetic or fallback diff)

--font-display.reason: Font stack quote-style / fallback-list variant (cosmetic or fallback diff)

--radius-pill.reason: DIAGNOSED (getComputedStyle 2026-06-30): .gd-board sets --radius-pill:9999px on the element (LIVE via self-declaration). :root renders 999px (skin-v2/generated). Not :root drift.

--radius-xl.reason: DIAGNOSED (getComputedStyle 2026-06-30): LIVE in app and preview — neither skin-v2 nor generated defines --radius-xl, so the :root 8px renders. Intentional kept-distinct, not drift.

--radius-xs.reason: DIAGNOSED (getComputedStyle 2026-06-30): .gd-board sets --radius-xs:2px on the element (LIVE via self-declaration); var(--r-0) alias resolves to 2px. Not :root drift.

--scrim-strong.reason: UNREVIEWED: color/shadow override; some a11y-driven (variables.css L598); reconcile direction TBD (chunk F)

--shadow-card.reason: UNREVIEWED: color/shadow override; some a11y-driven (variables.css L598); reconcile direction TBD (chunk F)

--spacing-card.reason: Cockpit density override — keep generated ladder intact, render tighter (variables.css L382-386)

--spacing-element.reason: Cockpit density override — keep generated ladder intact, render tighter (variables.css L382-386)

--spacing-group.reason: Cockpit density override — keep generated ladder intact, render tighter (variables.css L382-386)

--type-body.reason: Type composite re-points font stack to system fallback (variables.css)

--type-caption.reason: Type composite re-points font stack to system fallback (variables.css)

--type-kpi-l.reason: Type composite re-points font stack to system fallback (variables.css)

--type-kpi-m.reason: Type composite re-points font stack to system fallback (variables.css)
